author: Dexterity104
title: Deterministic multi-language smart-contract vulnerability miner
notes: A general high/critical vulnerability miner for the sn60__bitsec/miner lane across Solidity, Vyper, Rust, Move and Cairo. It ranks the project's own source, triages the highest-risk files, then performs a deep audit and an independent second-opinion audit of the core files and merges the results, alongside model-free structural checks. Decoding is deterministic (temperature 0). Each finding is localized to an exact file and function. Self-contained, stdlib-only, no hardcoded or project-specific content.
